heading: Today
text: Steamy sun, hot and humid. Late-day showers and storms spreading west to east.

heading: Friday Night
text: Evening showers, a few strong thunderstorms, clearing latee.

heading: Saturday
text: Partly to mostly sunny. Less humid.
temperature: Upper 70s to upper 80s, north to south

heading: Sunday
text: Sunny and warm. Some late-day showers or storms north and west.
